column25: Zebec Card delivers non-custodial crypto spending across 18+ blockchains including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana with support for 150+ tokens through three distinct tiers—Silver (single-load entry), Carbon (reloadable mid-tier), and Black (premium via Mobilum). Retain complete control of crypto in your own wallet until loading the card, then enjoy instant 1:1 stablecoin conversion with zero markup and seamless Mastercard acceptance at 60+ million merchants across 210 countries and territories. With instant virtual card issuance via app or Telegram bot, Apple Pay and Google Pay integration, and weekly crypto airdrops for ZBNC stakers, Zebec bridges Solana's streaming payment protocol with everyday spending. Perfect for privacy-focused users seeking self-custody with flexible spending options, though note Silver cards are non-reloadable and physical cards remain in limited rollout.

column25: Zypto Card caters to high-volume crypto spenders with exceptional spending limits reaching $1 million monthly on Premium physical Visa Signature cards and $150,000 monthly on reloadable virtual cards. Supporting 100+ cryptocurrencies across multiple blockchains with integration into Zypto's broader non-custodial wallet ecosystem, the platform offers multiple card options: Premium physical with Visa Signature benefits (concierge services, airport lounge access, travel protection), Classic physical, reloadable virtual, and globally available single-load virtual cards in 180+ countries. Perfect for LATAM, APAC, and African markets requiring substantial crypto-to-fiat spending capacity with premium travel perks, though note that Premium and reloadable options have regional restrictions, no disclosed cashback program, and pricing transparency varies by tier—making Zypto ideal for high-net-worth individuals and businesses prioritizing liquidity over rewards.
